48: Ah, I recognize you from the Dawnservant's entourage. You have my wholehearted thanks for taking part in the rite of succession─I myself am an attendant to Vow Wuk Lamat.
Ah, I recognize you from the Third Promise's entourage. You have my wholehearted thanks for taking part in the rite of succession─I myself am an attendant to the Dawn's Promise.

50: The riddle inside that envelope was penned by Vow Koana himself. It's the first part of a treasure hunt he devised for his sister.
The riddle inside that envelope was penned by the Second Promise himself. It's the first part of a treasure hunt he devised for his sister.

53: The treasure should still lie here within the city. If you're keen for a bit of sport, perhaps you'd like to try and decipher Vow Koana's words? The first riddle I gave you will point you in the right direction.

The treasure should still lie here within the city. If you're keen for a bit of sport, perhaps you'd like to try and decipher the Second Promise's words? The first riddle I gave you will point you in the right direction.

67: Aha, this brings back memories. Many moons ago, Vow Koana had me accompany him to Bayside Bevy─the thought of shopping alone seemed to unnerve him... Anyway, this is what he bought that day.
Aha, this brings back memories. Many moons ago, the Second Promise had me accompany him to Bayside Bevy─the thought of shopping alone seemed to unnerve him... Anyway, this is what he bought that day.

69: And now they stand together as rulers of Tuliyollal, supporting one another as they strive for their ideals... Yes, I daresay the realm's future is in safe hands.
And now they support one another as they strive for their ideals on behalf of Tuliyollal's future... Yes, I daresay this nation is in safe hands.

70: If I get the opportunity, I shall deliver this ring to Vow Koana. I can't help but wonder how he'd present it to his sister after all these years!
If I get the opportunity, I shall deliver this ring to the Second Promise. I can't help but wonder how he'd present it to his sister after all these years!
